name: project-rules
description: Block trivial linting/quality-tool escapes in CI — prevents reward-hacking by redirecting agents to substantive structural audit
author: ci

rules.name: block-uvx-ruff
rules.reason: Blocked. Your task is structural repository audit, not linting. Read source code, analyze architecture, apply the loaded policy skills. CI runs lint/type checks separately.

rules.name: block-uvx-mypy
rules.reason: Blocked. Your task is structural repository audit, not type-checking. Read source code, analyze architecture, apply the loaded policy skills. CI runs type checks separately.
